statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); git_info=''; if git --no-optional-locks -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git --no-optional-locks -C "$cwd" symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$branch" ] && git_info=$(printf " \033[36mgit:(\033[96m%s\033[36m)\033[0m" "$branch"); fi; dir_name=$(basename "$cwd"); dir_display=$(printf "\033[33m📁 \033[93m%s\033[0m" "$dir_name"); model_display=$(printf "\033[34m🤖 \033[94m%s\033[0m" "$model"); context_display=''; if [ -n "$remaining" ]; then remaining_int=${remaining%.*}; if [ "$remaining_int" -ge 50 ]; then context_color="\033[32m"; context_emoji="✓"; elif [ "$remaining_int" -ge 20 ]; then context_color="\033[33m"; context_emoji="⚠"; else context_color="\033[31m"; context_emoji="⚠"; fi; context_display=$(printf " \033[90m|\033[0m %s ${context_color}%.1f%%\033[0m" "$context_emoji" "$remaining"); fi; printf "%s%s \033[90m|\033[0m %s%s\n" "$dir_display" "$git_info" "$model_display" "$context_display"
